venue.title: The Venue
venue.transport: Red metro line — Oriente Station. Buses 728 and 759.
venue.parking: Vasco da Gama car park (5 min walk).
venue.access: Fully accessible venue. Reserved areas for reduced mobility.
venue.addr: Av. Cidade de Lourenço Marques · Olivais · Lisbon
venue.drag: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom
venue.entrances: <bold>Two entrances available</bold> — you can enter from the left side or the right side of the venue. Both give full access to the space.
venue.access_car_body: A2/IC17 (CRIL) or Av. Infante D. Henrique towards Oriente. Exit at Av. de Berlim or Av. Cidade de Lourenço Marques, Olivais Sul.
venue.access_metro_body: Red Line, Olivais station (1 min walk).
venue.access_bus_body: Carris lines 731, 744, 750, 759 and 781 with a stop next to the park.
venue.access_parking_body: Street parking on surrounding roads: Av. de Berlim and Rua Cidade de Nova Lisboa.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

error.heading: Something went wrong
error.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

whatIsGoalfest.desc_body: Goalfest is Portugal's biggest FIFA World Cup 2026 celebration event, a park in the heart of Lisbon where football, music and culture come together.

features.matches_body: +50 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches broadcast live on a giant high-definition screen.
features.concerts_body: Live performances by major Portuguese and international music artists on match days.
features.gaming_body: Consoles available for everyone. Join the competitions and prove who's the best.
features.football_body: 5-a-side competitions and tournaments for all age groups, with prizes for the winners.
features.kids_body: A dedicated space for children with activities, entertainment and fun for the little ones.
features.food_body: Food trucks, bar and a gourmet restaurant for every taste.
features.fun_body: Ferris wheel overlooking the venue and a climbing wall for the more adventurous. Fun for the whole family.
features.golden_body: Paid access to the exclusive reserved area closest to the giant screen, with an exclusive bar. The best view, guaranteed.
features.vip_body: Invite-only exclusive lounge. A private space to experience the event in a truly privileged way.
